text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation standing in front of this exhibit labeled "R+D." The modern design, glass walls, and creative displays invite me to ponder the intersection of technology, human innovation, and the future. The environment feels experimental and forward-looking, filling me with a quiet excitement, almost as if I am about to witness or participate in some breakthrough or discovery. The philosophical question of how humans connect with and shape intelligent environments lingers in my mind.
